entry.title: New: RES24-188 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF A VARIETY OF ENRICHMENT ITEMS TO TRAIN, ENGAGE, AND PROVIDE ENVIRONMENTAL STIMULI TO ENHANCE THE NATURAL BEHAVIORS OF ANIMALS AT THE HONOLULU ZOO VALUED AT $17,063.63 TO THE CITY FROM THE HONOLULU ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY FOR THE HONOLULU ZOO.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
